mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Google Summer of Code (GSoC)
mentorship_programmes.description: Paid mentorship programme where students work on open source projects with mentor guidance over 12 weeks.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to summerofcode.withgoogle.com → Click 'Get Started' → Register as a contributor → Browse organisations → Submit proposal.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: CS Research Mentorship Program (CSRMP)
mentorship_programmes.description: Connects students from historically marginalized groups with Google researchers for CS research mentorship.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: UG/PG students in CS or related fields from underrepresented groups
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to research.google/outreach/csrmp → Click 'Apply' during open application window → Fill the student application form.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Google Developer Student Clubs (GDSC) Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Campus-based mentorship through Google-supported student clubs; workshops, projects, and networking.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to gdsc.community.dev → Search for your college → Click 'Join Club' or contact your campus GDSC lead.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Microsoft Mentorship / Aspire Program
mentorship_programmes.description: Mentorship programme for new graduates and interns pairing them with senior Microsoft employees.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to careers.microsoft.com → Click 'Students' → Select 'University Internship' → Search open roles → Apply. Mentorship is embedded in the internship.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Microsoft Research PhD Fellowship
mentorship_programmes.description: Fellowship for PhD students with mentorship from Microsoft Research scientists.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: PhD students in CS, AI, or related fields
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to microsoft.com/research → Academic Programs → PhD Fellowship → Click Apply → Submit research proposal and CV.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: AWS AI & ML Scholars Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Free AI/ML learning programme with mentorship from AWS experts. Aims to sponsor 100,000 learners.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: 18+ years, no prior AI/ML experience required
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to aws.amazon.com/scholars → Click 'Apply Now' → Create AWS account → Fill application form → Enroll in AWS Skill Builder courses.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Amazon Future Engineer Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Amazon's student outreach programme providing mentorship, scholarships, and internship pipeline.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: High school and college students in CS
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to amazonfutureengineer.com → Click 'Explore Programs' → Select scholarship or mentorship track → Apply through the form.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Apple Next-Gen Innovators Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: One-on-one mentorship pairing engineering students with Apple engineers for 8 months.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to apple.com/careers → Click 'Students' → Search 'mentorship' or 'intern' → Apply to relevant programmes. Next-Gen Innovators is invite-only via selected universities.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Meta University (Mentorship for Underrepresented Students)
mentorship_programmes.description: Paid internship with embedded mentorship for first and second year underrepresented students in tech.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to metacareers.com/careerprograms/pathways/metauniversity → Click 'Apply' → Create Meta Careers account → Submit application with resume.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Adobe Research Women-in-Technology Scholarship
mentorship_programmes.description: Scholarship and mentorship programme for women pursuing degrees in CS or related fields.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: Female students in CS or related fields
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to research.adobe.com/scholarship → Read eligibility → Click 'Apply' → Submit application with transcript and recommendation letter.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: SheCodes by Adobe Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Female-specific mentorship and coding programme supporting women in technology careers.
mentorship_programmes.deadline: Check Adobe Careers for current cycle
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to careers.adobe.com → Search 'SheCodes' → Click on the listing → Create Adobe Careers account → Apply with resume.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Goldman Sachs Catalyst Programme (India)
mentorship_programmes.description: 3-month virtual mentoring for women students from low-income communities. Partners with Empower Ananya & Katalyst NGOs.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: Women undergraduates from low-income communities in India
mentorship_programmes.stipend_or_benefits: Professional skill development + GS internship pathway
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to goldmansachs.com/worldwide/india/careers/catalyst-program → Click 'Apply' → Applications sourced via Empower Ananya & Katalyst NGOs — contact them directly if no open form.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Goldman Sachs Emerging Leaders Series
mentorship_programmes.description: Technical training + mentorship + transparency into GS recruitment for 2nd year undergraduates.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to goldmansachs.com/careers/students → Click 'Programs & Internships' → Select 'Emerging Leaders' or 'India Programs' → Apply during open window.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: McKinsey Next Generation Women Leaders
mentorship_programmes.description: Immersive mentorship and leadership development programme for undergraduate women.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Visit the link and look for mentorship/student programmes section.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: McKinsey Freshman Leadership Program
mentorship_programmes.description: Mentorship programme for first-year students to explore consulting careers at McKinsey.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Visit the link and look for mentorship/student programmes section.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: BCG Platinion Mentorship / Advance Programme
mentorship_programmes.description: Mentorship embedded in BCG's tech consulting division for students interested in tech-driven consulting.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to careers.bcg.com/students → Click 'Explore roles' → Filter by 'Internship' or 'Fellowship' → Select India region → Apply. Mentorship is embedded in the programme.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Morgan Stanley Early Careers Mentorship (India)
mentorship_programmes.description: Mentorship for students interested in technology and finance roles at Morgan Stanley India offices.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to morganstanley.com/people-opportunities/students-graduates → Click 'Asia Pacific' → Select India programmes → Apply with resume and cover letter.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: NXP Women in Technology (WIT) Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Mentorship programme specifically for women in electronics/CS fields with NXP engineers as mentors.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: Female students in ECE, CS, Electrical
mentorship_programmes.stipend_or_benefits: Mentorship + internship pathway at NXP India
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to nxp.com/careers → Click 'Students & Graduates' → Search for WIT/Women in Technology roles in India → Apply online.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Google Student Programmes
mentorship_programmes.description: Home | Google Summer of Code This site uses cookies from Google to deliver and enhance the quality of its services and to analyze traffic. Learn more OK, got it close Home About How it works Get started Past programs Help Rules Terms Log in person_filled Welcome to our new site! Learn more GSoC 2026
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Visit the link and look for mentorship/student programmes section.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Bosch Tech Compass Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Mentorship programme for engineering students working with Bosch engineers on real projects.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: Engineering students in ECE, Mechanical, CS
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to bosch.in/careers → Click 'Your Entry into Bosch' → 'Internships' → Click 'Find your internship' → Filter by India → Apply with resume.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Siemens Student Mentorship Programme
mentorship_programmes.description: Mentorship for engineering students embedded in Siemens India internship programme.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: Engineering students in ECE, Electrical, CS, Mechanical
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to jobs.siemens.com → Search 'intern' → Filter Country = India → Click on listing → Create Siemens account → Apply.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: L&T Build India Scholarship cum Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Scholarship and mentorship for engineering students from economically weaker sections.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to larsentoubro.com/corporate/career/campus-recruitment → Look for 'Build India Scholarship' → Click Apply → Submit academic documents.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Unstop Mentorship Platform
mentorship_programmes.description: Platform connecting students with industry mentors across tech, finance, consulting, and more.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to unstop.com/mentorship → Browse mentors by domain → Click 'Book Session' → Register/Login → Schedule a session.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Internshala Trainings + Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Online training programmes with mentorship from industry professionals in tech, marketing, and more.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to trainings.internshala.com → Browse courses with mentorship → Click 'Enroll Now' → Register/Login → Pay fee (if any) → Start learning with mentor support.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: ISRO Yuva Vigyan Vaigyanik (YUVIKA) Programme
mentorship_programmes.description: Annual 2-week residential programme for Class 9 students — hands-on mentorship by ISRO scientists.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to isro.gov.in/Students.html → Click 'YUVIKA' → Register on the YUVIKA portal during open window (usually Jan-Feb) → Submit application with school documents.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: ISRO Student Project Trainee Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Students work under ISRO scientists on live projects. Direct mentorship from space scientists.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech 6th semester or above; min 60% / 6.32 CGPA
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to isro.gov.in/InternshipAndProjects.html → Read eligibility → Visit individual ISRO centre websites (VSSC, SAC, URSC etc.) → Apply directly to centre with college NOC + resume.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: DRDO Research Mentorship / Apprenticeship
mentorship_programmes.description: Students work under DRDO scientists on defence research projects. Mentorship from senior researchers.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: UG/PG students in Engineering or Science
mentorship_programmes.branch_required: Electronics, Computer Science, Mechanical, Electrical, Chemical
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to drdo.gov.in/internship-scheme → Read eligibility → Contact specific DRDO lab directly with application + college NOC + resume. No central portal — apply to labs individually.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: NITI Aayog Young Professional Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Policy mentorship where students work with NITI Aayog officers on national development projects.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to niti.gov.in/internship → Click 'Apply' → Fill the online form with academic details → Upload resume and NOC → Submit during open window.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: RBI Young Scholars Mentorship
mentorship_programmes.description: Mentorship embedded in RBI Summer Internship — students learn monetary policy and financial systems directly.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: Undergraduate students in Economics, Finance, Statistics
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to opportunities.rbi.org.in/Scripts/Internships.aspx → Click 'Apply Online' → Register with email → Fill application form → Upload documents → Submit.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: AICTE Mentor-Mentee Scheme (Margdarshan)
mentorship_programmes.description: AICTE scheme pairing weaker engineering institutions with mentor institutions for academic improvement.
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to aicte-india.org → Search 'Margdarshan' or 'Mentor Scheme' → Your institution registers — individual student access via college TPO.

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: Pragati Scholarship cum Mentorship (Girls)
mentorship_programmes.description: Scholarship and mentorship for female students in technical education from economically weaker families.
mentorship_programmes.eligibility: Female students in AICTE-approved technical programs from EWS
mentorship_programmes.how_to_apply: Go to aicte-india.org/bureaus/rifd/pragati → Click 'Apply' → Register as student → Fill income/academic details → Submit before deadline (usually Sep-Oct).

mentorship_programmes.programme_name: ISRO Student Programmes
